summary: Web app with Notes view and Routine tab features. Implementing: (1) Notes View image aspect ratio fix to display images at natural dimensions, (2) Routine tab file upload copied from existing Notes file upload component.

existing_features.title: In the Notes view, remove any fixed aspect ratio constraints from image containers in NoteCard and NoteModal so that images display at their natural dimensions. The image container should resize to fit the actual image proportions, content should wrap naturally, and responsive behavior must be preserved. No fixed aspect ratio classes (e.g., aspect-video, aspect-square) should be applied to note image elements.

Add a file upload feature to RoutinesPage by integrating the existing ImageUploadPicker component (frontend/src/components/common/ImageUploadPicker.tsx) identically to how it is used in the Notes section. The UI, styling, trigger button appearance, dropdown options (camera, gallery, file), outside-click/Escape dismissal behavior, and image handling logic must be copied exactly from the Notes implementation into the routine item flow. Do not alter any existing routine functionality, drag-and-drop, or other controls.

new_feature_requests.summary: Notes View image fix: display images at natural dimensions without fixed aspect ratios
Routine tab file upload: copy exact file upload component from Notes section
